parameters.jsCode:
const QUERY_POOL = [
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" shopify',
  'site:.de inurl:"/collections/all" shopify',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" mode fashion -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" beauty kosmetik -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" sport fitness -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" schmuck accessoires -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" wohnen moebel einrichtung -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" elektronik technik -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" kueche haushalt -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" gesundheit wellness -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" baby kinder -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" outdoor camping -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" haustier tier -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/products/" gaming spiele -blog -tutorial',
  'site:.de inurl:"/collections/" mode -blog -tutorial -entfernen',
  'site:.de inurl:"/collections/" beauty -blog -tutorial -entfernen',
  'site:.de inurl:"/collections/" sport -blog -tutorial -entfernen',
  'site:.de inurl:"/collections/" wohnen -blog -tutorial -entfernen',
  '"cdn.shopify.com" site:.de -site:myshopify.com -inurl:blog -inurl:tutorial',
  '"myshopify.com" site:.de -site:myshopify.com inurl:"/products/"'
];

const shuffled = QUERY_POOL.slice().sort(() => 0.5 - Math.random());
return shuffled.slice(0, 5).map((query, idx) => ({ json: { query, idx } }));
